card_eligibility.source_phrase: To apply for a library card, you do not have to be a resident of Malden, but you do have to be a resident of Massachusetts.
card_eligibility.source_block: To apply for a library card, you do not have to be a resident of Malden, but you do have to be a resident of Massachusetts. People applying for a library card must provide a valid photo ID, and an accepted form of proof of current address. (If your photo ID has your current address, then that is all you need.)
